name: business translation: regulated data and compliance map to security encryption and audit logging grounded in NIST 800-53
command:
cat > profile.json <<'JEOF'
{"schema_version":"1.0","complete":true,"answers":{"workload":"gov analytics","motivation":"compliance","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"seconds","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"il5","scale":"large","budget_posture":"cost-first"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile profile.json --out tr.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tr.json","utf8"));const s=j.pillars.security;const e=s.find(c=>c.concern==="encryption_at_rest");const al=s.find(c=>c.concern==="audit_logging");process.exit(e&&al&&e.source_id==="nist-800-53"&&al.source_id==="nist-800-53"?0:1)' && echo security-mapped 1>&2
